image_search_queries.primary_query: outdoor music festival night stage crowd
fallback_queries: concert crowd hands raised stage lights
image_search_queries.notes: Want a band-on-stage or crowd-with-stage-lights vibe matching Volcanic Theatre Pub / Century Center scale (mid-size venue, not stadium).
Multiple cellos preferred; warm tungsten stage lighting matches Tower Theatre interior.
Generic comedy-club vibe; do NOT use a Paula Poundstone press photo without explicit license. Stock comedy imagery only.

image_search_queries.primary_query: mothers day brunch table flowers mimosa
fallback_queries: buffet table fresh flowers natural light
image_search_queries.notes: River-adjacent or natural-light brunch tablescape. Riverhouse setting is on the Deschutes — riverside or biophilic vibe ideal.

image_search_queries.primary_query: motorcycle group ride open road oregon mountains
image_search_queries.notes: Group of cruisers riding together. Cascade-foothills landscape preferred; high-desert Oregon vibe.

intro_card_image.primary_query: bend oregon old mill district sunset deschutes
intro_card_image.notes: This is the title card. Iconic Bend imagery. Will be heavily darkened (rgba 0,0,0,0.60 scrim) for title text legibility.

outro_card_image.notes: No image on outro — clean kinetic CTA card.

unsplash_compliance.rationale: Per Unsplash API guidelines, must hit the trigger_download endpoint when an image is selected for use, and must include utm_source=ryan_realty + utm_medium=referral in attribution links.

shutterstock_fallback.use_only_if: Unsplash returns no acceptable result for an event keyword AND has been retried with all fallback queries.
shutterstock_fallback.license: Standard editorial / commercial — verify per use
shutterstock_fallback.notes: Shutterstock images are paid licenses. Only fall back if Unsplash genuinely fails.

data_accuracy_notes: Per CLAUDE.md §0, every image is decorative/illustrative — not a claim of fact. The factual content is in the title text, dates, venues, and times overlaid on the image. Image attribution is required regardless.
